scripts.test: node --test tools/__tests__/sourceDevAuthDefaults.test.mjs tools/__tests__/releaseSurface.test.mjs tools/__tests__/releaseDocsAlignment.test.mjs tools/__tests__/apiSurface.test.mjs tools/__tests__/apiDiff.test.mjs tools/__tests__/standardsMatrix.test.mjs tools/__tests__/standardsRunner.test.mjs tools/__tests__/standardsRow3.test.mjs tools/__tests__/standardsRow4.test.mjs tools/__tests__/releasePr.test.mjs tools/__tests__/releaseReadiness.test.mjs tools/__tests__/releaseReadinessSignoff.test.mjs tools/__tests__/releaseReadinessWorkflow.test.mjs tools/__tests__/productRelease.test.mjs tools/__tests__/packageReleaseAssets.test.mjs tools/__tests__/issueTemplates.test.mjs tools/__tests__/screenshotDemoConfig.test.mjs tools/__tests__/productPositioning.test.mjs && turbo run test
scripts.e2e: pnpm e2e:stop && node tools/dev-package-runner.mjs webui pnpm build && (node tools/dev-package-runner.mjs api node apps/api/dist/index.js & pnpm --filter t3x-webui start & wait)
scripts.e2e:api: (lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true) && node tools/dev-package-runner.mjs api pnpm build && node tools/dev-package-runner.mjs api node apps/api/dist/index.js
scripts.e2e:webui: (lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true) && node tools/dev-package-runner.mjs webui pnpm --filter t3x-webui build && pnpm --filter t3x-webui start
scripts.e2e:stop: (lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true); (lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true)
scripts.stop:api: lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -TERM 2>/dev/null || echo 'API not running'
scripts.stop:webui: lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -TERM 2>/dev/null || echo 'WebUI not running'
scripts.publish-packages: pnpm verify:versions && pnpm build && node tools/publish-package-tarballs.mjs
